calendar.matters:
Petition Of Court Appointed Counsel For Attorneys Fees And Costs For Services For The Conservatorship Of The Person And Estate And Related Trust Of Settlor Conservatee Not Under Court Supervision
TENTATIVE RULING: PRELIMINARY TENTATIVE RULING:
The Court has no jurisdiction over the trust, which was not brought under Court supervision.
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE
Petition For Order Approving And Confirming All Acts Of Conservator Of Person; And, Awarding Conservator?S And Attorneys? Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 7/1/26 to be heard with the other (fee) petitions.
The register of actions reflects a Final I&A filed on 4/14/26 but no proof of service of notice of how to object to the I&A.
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

Petition For Order Approving And Confirming All Acts Of Conservator Of Person; And, Awarding Conservator?S And Attorneys? Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Jul-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 7/1/26 to be reviewed with the accounting.
Mr. Cunningham's proposed hourly fee schedule was not attached to the petition filed on 10/11/24 or the amended petition filed on 11/19/24 nor does it appear to have been filed concurrently with either I&A. [Probate Code Sections 1821(c)(1) and 2614.7.] There was only a request for periodic payments to him in the petitions.
Did the parties, who received notice electronically, consent in writing to electronic service? [CRC 2.251(b).]
Another court's local rules or "guidelines" are not authority or determinative of this court's discretion. Furthermore, this examiner is not aware of any authority for any court to set limits on an attorney's hourly rate; fee requests must be substantiated and must be reasonable.
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE
